channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Gujarat BJP Candidate and Father Arrested for Allegedly Halting Village Water Supply Post Election Loss
item.description: In Gujarat's Bharuch district, a Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) candidate, Shakil Malek, along with his father Khalid Malek, faced arrest following allegations of cutting off water supply to Dehgam vill...

item.title: Police investigate possible link between Brixton shooting and nearby stabbing
item.description: Police in London are investigating a potential connection between a drive-by shooting in Brixton and a stabbing incident that occurred approximately an hour later nearby. The shooting, which took plac...

item.title: Tricia Penrose weds Chris Hargreaves in Lancashire, four years after divorce
item.description: Tricia Penrose, widely recognised for her role as Gina Bellamy in the long-running ITV series Heartbeat, has married Chris Hargreaves in a romantic ceremony at Briars Hall Country Club in Lancashire. ...

item.title: Detailed Preview of Key Constituencies in 2026 Assembly Elections Across Five States
item.description: The 2026 assembly elections across multiple Indian states are expected to be decided not merely by broad political swings but by a set of highly competitive constituencies with narrow margins and high...

item.title: Iran Rejects US Military Action as Trump Evaluates Peace Proposal
item.description: Iran has declared that a military operation by the United States is 'impossible', highlighting the continued tensions between the two nations. This statement comes as former U.S. President Donald Trum...

item.title: Authors Reflect on Comments That Profoundly Shaped Their Lives
item.description: This article explores the profound impact that seemingly minor comments can have on individuals' lives, as recounted by five writers. Matt Haig recalls being labelled as 'special needs' at the age of ...

item.title: NDTV Education Article Could Not Be Accessed Due to Server Restriction
item.description: The requested news article from NDTV's education section for school assembly headlines on May 4 could not be accessed. The user encountered an access denial message indicating that permission to view ...

item.title: How to Choose a Long-Lasting Luxury Handbag
item.description: The article explores what truly makes a luxury handbag a worthwhile investment. It argues that an investment bag should not be bought with the hope of resale profit but rather for its durability and c...

item.title: Dar es Salaam Prepares for Afcon 2027 with Focus on Hotel Investments
item.description: As Tanzania dey prepare to co-host the 2027 Africa Cup of Nations alongside Kenya and Uganda, Dar es Salaam dey become hotspot for hotel and hospitality investment. Di city dey face shortage of modern...

item.title: Horoscope Guidance for May 2, 2026
item.description: The Globe and Mail provides daily horoscope insights for May 2, 2026, authored by Sally Brompton. For those celebrating their birthday today, the forecast is promising, with luck favouring them and en...

item.title: Marikina Shoemakers Showcase Craftsmanship at Miss Universe Philippines 2026
item.description: The 2026 Miss Universe Philippines pageant featured locally made Marikina shoes, highlighting the country's renowned shoe-making industry. Candidates wore footwear from the SAFATOS Marikina line in ke...

item.title: Severe Flooding Forces Highway Closures and Local Emergency Declarations in Saskatchewan
item.description: Parts of Saskatchewan are facing significant disruptions as heavy rainfall has led to widespread flooding, prompting the declaration of local emergencies in multiple communities. Authorities have repo...

item.title: Emfuleni responds to pollution concerns as municipal manager readies for court appearance
item.description: Emfuleni Local Municipality has firmly rejected allegations of escalating environmental pollution amid preparations for the court appearance of municipal manager April Ntuli on May 4 in Vanderbijlpark...

item.title: Barcelona Secure Spot in Women's Champions League Final After Beating Bayern Munich 4-2
item.description: Barcelona clinched a thrilling 4-2 victory over Bayern Munich to secure their place in the final of the Women’s Champions League, winning 5-3 on aggregate. The match, held at Camp Nou, saw Alexia Pute...

item.title: Secretary of State Marco Rubio Participates in Wedding DJ Event Amid Controversial Iran Conflict
item.description: On May 3, 2026, Secretary of State Marco Rubio appeared behind DJ equipment at a family wedding in an attempt to energize the crowd, according to a video shared by White House deputy chief of staff Da...

item.title: Kent Pastrana Finishes UST Career as Women's 3x3 Basketball MVP
item.description: Kent Pastrana concluded his collegiate career at the University of Santo Tomas (UST) with a remarkable achievement in the women's 3x3 basketball tournament, securing both the championship title and th...

item.title: Midrand households spend thousands after year-long outage linked to damaged transformer
item.description: Around 46 households in Ebony Park Phase 1, Midrand, have been without electricity since April 2025 after a transformer failure blamed on illegal connections and meter tampering. Eskom says the damage...

item.title: Woman killed in random stabbing in Barcelona street; suspect arrested
item.description: A woman was tragically killed in a street attack in Esplugues de Llobregat, Barcelona, in what authorities believe was a random act of violence. The incident occurred in broad daylight at around 11am,...

item.title: Concerns raised over federal plan to amend food safety laws amid trade and health debate
item.description: The Canadian government’s spring economic update proposes changes to food safety laws, specifically the Canadian Food Inspection Agency Act and the Pest Control Products Act, to consider food security...

item.title: Federal government considers reassigning co-working spaces to accommodate four-day office return
item.description: The federal government is exploring the option of reallocating co-working sites to address space shortages as departments prepare for the return of unionized employees to the office four days a week s...
